ground_truth_before_search_fix.note: Published Atta existed in state with seller_name=null and was filtered out of search_items

ground_truth_after_search_fix_and_gw_res.pollution: Many Dispatch Proof / Hermes Fix* titles from prior merchant tests

findings.detail: NL 'atta for roti tonight' early-nav used q=roti (0 matches) while orb claimed Atta loading
Find-only ask led to unsolicited add_to_cart and /cart without explicit add request
Before search filter fix, orb/cart showed AadhaarChain Whole Wheat Atta while buyer/search?q=atta returned 0
commerce_demo.search_items required non-empty seller_name — hid published fixture SKUs
After fix, atta search returns 17 titles including Dispatch Proof* test litter — Samantha relevance validation still needed
